raw_consumer_statement:
A purchase was made using my Sears Mastercard on XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I have never been to XXXX, nor did I authorize anyone to use my card there. Initially, I thought the charge was a purchase that I had made, but I later realized that it was a purchase made in XXXX at a facility that I have never heard of. 
I filed a dispute with Citibank, who has informed me that since they have no recourse to recover the funds that it is my responsibility to pay. I will be cancelling my account with Citibank and have no intention of ever doing business with them again.
